programme.desc: A botched assassination attempt in Belgravia forces NCIS to protect the defence minister's daughter, who is studying in the U.S. and is smitten with McGee. Meanwhile, Gibbs investigates the death of a marine who was killed in a bombing.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light
programme.desc: When Chicago's 'Nightcrawler' Bobby Trent is murdered over a single piece of footage, Intelligence must investigate one of Chicago's wealthiest families, uncovering a lineage of old money and secrets.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Grasping for Salvation

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cure

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Around the Clock

programme.title: Movie: Sleigh Bells Ring

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Return to Four Corners

programme.title: Witches of Salem: Satan Comes to Salem
programme.desc: An inexplicable evil tormenting the young girls of Reverend Samuel Parris's household swiftly spreads through the Puritan community of Salem Village. Fearing the influence of the devil, the afflicted soon begin to make accusations of witchcraft.

programme.title: Witches of Salem: The Road to Hell
programme.desc: Paranoia reaches fever pitch as the demonic conspiracy terrorizing Salem Village grows, leaving no one safe. Boston jail fills with suspected witches, and the accused could face execution if found guilty of witchcraft.

programme.title: Witches of Salem: Lust for Blood
programme.desc: The Salem witch trials finally begin with the case against Bridget Bishop, who is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death by hanging. But her death is not enough to quell the hysteria. Within a month five more women are tried and executed.

programme.title: Witches of Salem: Pray for Mercy
programme.desc: Salem Village's former minister, George Burroughs, is convicted of being the devil's ringleader of the witches. The witch-hunt continues despite growing opposition. Finally, the horrific trials stop after members of the elite are accused of witchcraft.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals: From the Morgue/ Obsession

programme.title: Below Deck: Off the Radar
programme.desc: After Rocky and Emile are disciplined for their dangerous stunt, Kate is hell-bent on making sure Rocky atones for her mistake. Meanwhile, Connie gets some terrible news that leaves her future on the boat in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Pretty Cheeks
programme.desc: Kate's charter guest soul mate from last season returns. Rocky tries to keep going with her mundane tasks while Don tries to make amends with Eddie. Kate questions Chef Leon's credentials and Don puts his future on the yacht in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: I Don't Date, I Mate
programme.desc: In spite of being a man down with Don's departure, Eddie and the rest of the deckhands feel relieved and stronger than ever. When guest Dean suggests a crew dive contest, the Eros team willing obliges and Rocky breaks out her beloved mermaid tail.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Ironing the Captain's Shorts
programme.desc: After their less-than-stellar date, Rocky relegates Emile to the friend zone, and he's not having any of it. Meanwhile, Kate fails to provision a special bottle of tequila for the new guests, and it could spell disaster for her tip if she can't find it.

programme.title: Below Deck: My Dearest Emile ...
programme.desc: Connie and Rocky's whipped cream bikini party leaves a big mess on 'Eros.' Eddie’s long-distance relationship is on the rocks, and his problems are compounded when Dane and the other 'deckies' make a series of stupid mistakes.

programme.title: Below Deck: Storm's a Comin'
programme.desc: Emile is miffed when Rocky spells out the status of their relationship in a very public way. When the charter guests require an elaborate multi-course tasting menu, Leon's failure to order provisions in time puts the meal, and tips, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Boom Boom in the Laundry Room

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!
programme.desc: Leon commits a faux pas by ignoring a guest's meal request which brings back a traumatic childhood memory for her. When a fire breaks out in the galley, the whole boat is in danger. Plus, Connie's deckhand skills impress Eddie and Captain Lee.

programme.title: Below Deck: What Took You So Long?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sweet Pawn of Mine
programme.desc: Kick off your shoes with the Pawn Stars when Rick and the Old Man are offered a pair of slippers owned by Pope Leo XIII.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Winchester, Lose or Draw
programme.desc: The guys check out a Winchester rifle from the Wounded Knee Massacre. Then, someone brings in a nickel slot machine from the 1940s. Later, the guys find a stray dog behind the shop, and Chumlee tries to find its rightful owner.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silver Linings
programme.desc: A guy brings in 100 pounds of pure silver. Rick gets stumped when a seller brings in a mysterious book.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: Prepare for liftoff with the Pawn Stars as the guys check out a toilet seat from NASA.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Shamrocked
programme.desc: Rick and Corey have trouble seeing eye-to-eye when a 1965 Buick Riviera comes in. A jacket from the first ever Pro Bowl gets thrown into the shop. And later, Lili tries to charm the guys.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chumlee's Last Laugh
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a massive Dukes of Hazzard toy collection. Then, time flies when a pocket watch engraved with Henry Ford II's signature lands in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spruce Goose
programme.desc: A test piece of Howard Hughes' Spruce Goose comes to the shop. Then, celebrity paintings by artist Stephen Fishwick are brought in. Later, it's any man's game when the guys make a wager over which doughnut Rick will eat.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Houston, We Have A Deal
programme.desc: A lunar Bible from Apollo 14; a 1930s Buck Rogers Disintegrator Gun; miniature samples of a 1950s kitchen; a 1950s Beetle Bailey original print.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Money to Pawn
programme.desc: Don't get fooled at the pawn shop when a seller hands Chumlee a thirty dollar bill. Will this curious cash have Chum reaching for his wallet to buy it or will it turn out to be a costly currency that's not worth making a deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Royally Pawned
programme.desc: A set of royal British armor has Rick suiting up to strike a bargain. Chumlee's purchase of a U. S. Open custom electric guitar gets no love from Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pistol Is Mightier Than the Sword
programme.desc: Rick checks out a sword-pistol combo from the 1700s. A portrait of John Barrymore, the famous film and theatre actor, may be worth a buy. Rick learns about an antique navigational timepiece from the 19th century. Corey's excited about a 1969 Harley.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned and Confused
programme.desc: A seller brings his Led Zeppelin vinyl collection to Rick and Chum. A fancy 19th century office desk may be a worthwhile buy. A game-used base from the 2016 World Series could be a home run for the guys. Rick takes a trip to see 'The Object.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Megawatt Money
programme.desc: Two signed David Carradine replica swords; first edition of T.S Eliot's 'Four Quartets'; a 1965 Battle of the Bulge board game; a 1920s radium crock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned at the Stake
programme.desc: Something wicked to the shop comes when an 18th century 'Tryal of Witches' book finds its way there. Rick checks out a 20th century airplane control yoke and a gold-plated banjo. The guys evaluate a restored car from the film 'Wanye's World.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: La La Land
programme.desc: Rick travels to Los Angeles to see what goods he can find for the shop. He discovers the largest 'Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory' prop collection in existence. Chum finds a helicopter owned by Vegas magician Dirk Arthur.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Crown Pawn
programme.desc: Corey bets it all on an original Triple Crown Trophy; let's see if he can win this horse race. Next the guys call in Rick Dale to save what might be one of the very first rides from Coney Island.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Home Alone
programme.desc: Ed McMahon has a snarling wheaten terrier; an adopted beagle won't leave the house; and an Australian shepherd won't let anyone in.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Triple Dog Trouble
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Shell Shocked
programme.desc: A veteran bomb-sniffing Labrador retriever develops severe symptoms of PTSD after a stint in Iraq. Will Cesar be able to help this heroic canine?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cat Worshipper
programme.desc: A pit bull-chow mix fears home cooking, a Rottweiler and a German shepherd battle for control of the house, and a Jack Russell mourns the death of the family cat.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Great Pains
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Spring Fever
programme.desc: The animals are going wild in Wiedman, MI as an unpredictable spring finally yields warm weather; and the Pol Vet clinic takes on a variety of cases resulting from the turn of the season.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Bull Pen
programme.desc: The arrival of spring in Michigan brings excitement and chaos to the clinic.

programme.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China: Ghosts of the Mountain

programme.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China: Realm of the Secret Jungle

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Doomsday Prophecy
programme.desc: A cutting-edge archaeological investigation reveals if the Dead Sea Scrolls foretold the final battle between the Jewish rebels and the Roman Empire. Using the latest science, experts uncover if the other prophecies from the ancient text came true.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Volcano Temple
programme.desc: The Pantheon is a 2,000-year-old temple with a dark secret; today, using cutting-edge archaeological methods and brand-new evidence, experts look beneath the streets of Rome to find out why it was built and how it survived so long.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse
programme.desc: The latest scientific investigations reveals the untold story of how a cataclysmic eruption transformed an entire region.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic

programme.title: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Doomsday Prophecy
programme.desc: A cutting-edge archaeological investigation reveals if the Dead Sea Scrolls foretold the final battle between the Jewish rebels and the Roman Empire. Using the latest science, experts uncover if the other prophecies from the ancient text came true.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Planets From Hell
programme.desc: Over the last twenty years we have discovered an extraordinary zoo of planetary nightmares outside our own solar system, all of them truly wild worlds, a collection of monsters. Discussing if all new planets are planets from hell.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: NASA's Journey to Mars
programme.desc: NASA is on a mission to send humans to Mars within just 15 years, but to reach this next frontier of space exploration, experts must discover brand-new technology and cutting-edge science that protects astronauts from the Red Planet's deadliest killers.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future
programme.desc: Elon Musk and experts from SpaceX and NASA are on a mission to revolutionize space exploration. Special inside access reveals how their cutting-edge spacecraft technology will carry humans to the moon, Mars and beyond.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Fire in the Desert
programme.desc: When Albuquerque, New Mexico mail carrier Marilyn Gandert disappears for days, no one knows where she could have gone. When her burnt body is found in the desert, detectives must find their murderer with few witnesses beyond Marilyn's family members.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Bloody Footprint
programme.desc: Maurice Goins, a friendly neighbor who provides meals to other tenants in his apartment complex, is found murdered in his bedroom. The case goes cold, until Lakewood, Ohio police suddenly receive a tip and the investigation is thrown into overdrive.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Look Back
programme.desc: Karen Simek is a talented food service worker. When her body is found with a gunshot wound outside her office in the early morning hours, it leaves her family in shock and sparks a year-long investigation, which ultimately leads detectives to her killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: Killer in Question: The Man with the Rabbit's Foot
programme.desc: When police find three people killed execution-style in the cooler of a Louisiana convenience store, it's just the start of the mystery. One man will give a series of conflicting confessions, leaving everyone to wonder what really happened that night.

programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: Killer in Question: The Man with the Rabbit's Foot

programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: American Monster: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Coming home from church, a local preacher finds his wife brutally stabbed and beaten, the apparent victim of a home invasion. His alibi is sound, as are their two grown sons. However, several details just don't add up. The truth shocks everyone.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath
programme.desc: On the day Robert Foust contemplated killing his own son, Aaron, he saw it as the only way to prevent Aaron from becoming a murderer. But instead, Robert chose to put himself and his son in God's hands. And God's plan would make him question everything.

programme.title: Diabolical: When All Else Fails
programme.desc: After her home is invaded and her husband murdered, Shaunna Dodd recounts her harrowing ordeal at gunpoint. But when investigators dig deeper, they uncover a tale of lies, infidelity, and shady characters who have wandered into the Washoe Valley.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Confident, motorcycle-riding Diane Snellen is a single mom trying to make her way in the world while navigating the dating scene of Georgetown, KY. But her path in life comes to an abrupt end when she's brutally stabbed in her own home.

programme.title: Betrayed: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: After Marilyn Reza, a church-going mother of two is found dead in her home, investigators turn their attention to the members of her local church. However, a secret confession at her funeral brings the true murderer to light.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.title: Suspicion: Murder in the Family
programme.desc: When young Alan Simpson goes missing in April 1985, his mother Brenda is determined to find him. The last person to see him alive is his stepmother Rosalind, who claims he just vanished into thin air. But Brenda will stop at nothing to get to the truth.

programme.title: Suspicion: The Killing Oath: Amy Loughren
programme.desc: Amy becomes a nurse so that she can save lives. But when patients in her care start to die in mysterious circumstances she is the only one who can figure out what or who is killing them. Then Amy comes to terrifying conclusion that she might be next.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Mormon Mom's Mission
programme.desc: Utah mom Jennifer is sent on a journey of despair and discovery in the aftermath of her sister-in-law's mysterious disappearance. Suspicion soon falls on the person Jennifer least expects - her own brother - and it's left to her to unearth the truth.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of the Rising Gun
programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans -- complete with a nice family next door. All is well until a robbery at the neighbor's home leads first to misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and horrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Kill-De-Sac
programme.desc: When a freewheeling family moves from California to the buttoned down enclave of Leesburg, Virginia, they quickly get on the wrong side of their neighbour across the way. The conflict escalates until bullets fly and blood flows in the street.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends – but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880s Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields versus the McCoys is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870s, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka and Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver and Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Most Unique

programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas tackle a rundown property in an up-and-coming neighborhood in Wellington, Florida. The stairwell and upstairs bedrooms and bathrooms are hurtin' for certain, so Rob and the ninjas give them the VIP treatment.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Firehouse Number 7
programme.desc: Firefighters ask the Dawgs to salvage what they can from their old fire house, and the team works with them to incorporate the materials into a new facility. Then, the guys heads to Highpoint, NC, to fill up their trucks with international treasures.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: New Jersey Mansion
programme.desc: The crew fights through layers of extravagant remodeling to salvage a governor's mansion in Livingston, NJ. The 1900s home challenges the team with unusual design nuances and well-built features. Later, Mike and Tay work on a build for a local bar.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: North Carolina Pick and Haul
programme.desc: The gang travel to North Carolina in hopes of salvaging a Mediterranean-style mansion in Charlotte and an iconic sign in Raleigh. Though many of the items have been set aside, loading stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers presents its own challenges.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Roanoke, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: At the warehouse, Mike builds a coffee table from a panel door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Old Navy Ship in Norfolk, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew salvage parts off a former navy ship, the USS Zuni/ USCG Tamaroa. Key finds include an officer's table, portholes, and wooden ship frames. At the warehouse, Mike builds a table from an airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Robeson County Jail
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the Dawgs salvage a 1950s jail in Lumberton, NC. Key items include a holding cell, sinks, and slate countertops. At the shop, Mike and Tay build a bar from bowling alley flooring.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Geyser Gulch
programme.desc: The Dawgs salvage the amusement park attraction, Geyser Gulch, at Silver Dollar City in Branson, MO. Key items include a water tower, air pressure guns, and a blue slide. While at the shop, Mike builds a hostess stand for a local restaurant.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Portside Marina
programme.desc: The Dawgs save the bow and stern of a boat on Smith Mountain Lake in Moneta, VA. The team cuts up an old Chevy van for a commissioned wall art piece. New dogs Molly May and Stella make their debut.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reed Creek Mill
programme.desc: The Dawgs salvage the Reed Creek Mill in Wytheville, VA. Key items found include conveyor belts and a flour hopper. Mike also builds a console for his nephew.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Riverfront House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs take on a Victorian house in Wellsville, OH. Key items salvaged include harlequin windows, corbels and front porch columns. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay build a wine rack from old brick molds.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fix Up on Deep Creek
programme.desc: A couple heads back to their favourite spot from their college days, searching for a new vacation home. They seek a fixer upper they can customize with three bedrooms, an open concept design and a large outdoor living space with easy lake access.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Deep Creek Dreaming
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Maryland. Their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people. However, finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Next Up: Niagara
programme.desc: A couple seek a property along Lake Ontario in Niagara County that could be an escape for the family, but needs some work. They are no strangers to renovations, but with a tight budget they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Canadian National Exhibition/ Prairiefest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is at the Canadian National Exhibition in Toronto to try a Thanksgiving waffle. Then he's off the Prairiefest in Oswego where he indulges in a kimchee Korean hot dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Sweet 'n' Savory Sensations

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Winner, Winner, Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Heading back to his Southern roots, Eddie Jackson is on the hunt for the best chicken dinners. Taking comfort food to the next level, these favorite dishes are trashy, messy and spicy. Winner, winner, it's chicken for dinner!

programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares home-cooked meals that are packed with locally grown veggies straight from the plant or prepared in a way that no vegetable has ever dreamed. Get ready to veg out with a full day of eats- without the meat!

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs Fafnir!

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: You're Next

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die
programme.desc: The Deeters are dog-mushers with a homestead on the edge of disaster. Bears dine on the dog food and the forest around them is a deadly tinder box. The Raneys must push them to make drastic changes, but discover the Deeters don't trust outsiders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Under Siege
programme.desc: The Raneys attempt to help the Zabec family in Virginia. With pigs destroying the homestead, predators killing livestock and a huge oak threatening their cabin, the Raneys must convince them that their free-range dream is killing their homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Off-Grid Dreams
programme.desc: In Colorado, the Raneys make a father's dream a reality by building a vintage root cellar and innovative greenhouse. In Michigan, Marty is determined to deliver sustainable power, protein and water to a family seeking self-sufficiency.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: The Oasis Challenge
programme.desc: In Florida, Lucas Congdon transforms a small yard into a little oasis and finally makes a dedicated caregiver's dream a reality. Later, he is tasked with a challenging project and builds an ocean-themed pool, with his first-ever water couch.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Off-Grid Dreams
programme.desc: In Colorado, the Raneys make a father's dream a reality by building a vintage root cellar and innovative greenhouse. In Michigan, Marty is determined to deliver sustainable power, protein and water to a family seeking self-sufficiency.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End XL: Coral Reef and Jungle Oasis
programme.desc: Lucas builds two projects drawing inspiration from two different natural wonders, a tropical jungle and coral reef.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Kenya vs. Ken
programme.desc: Cynthia and Mike's relationship is tested when his past becomes too much for Cynthia to handle. The girls kick out their frustrations during a game of kickball. Marc is back in town and invites Kenya's nemesis to group 'couple bowling.'

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ruined Peaches

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: More Love More Problems

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Moving Up and Moving On

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Star Is Born

programme.desc: A Yorkie is aggressive after going blind, a Pekingese mix is spoiled rotten, and a ranch-dwelling Rottweiler is dangerously obsessed with horses.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Incredible Mr. Quackerson

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol Speed Ahead

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future
programme.desc: Elon Musk and experts from SpaceX and NASA are on a mission to revolutionize space exploration. Special inside access reveals how their cutting-edge spacecraft technology will carry humans to the moon, Mars and beyond.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Big Bang Enigma
programme.desc: Expert astronomers use cutting-edge science to reveal further evidence behind the Big Bang theory, and startling new discoveries reveal that this cosmic creation may have been just a single step in the birth of many vast multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Expanded Edition: First Second
programme.desc: Travel back to the first second of the universe's existence with the latest science and information.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Expanded Edition: First Second
programme.desc: Travel back to the first second of the universe's existence with the latest science and information.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Big Bang
programme.desc: As experiments go, the Large Hadron Collider at Cern is one of the biggest. Its circular tunnel is 17 miles long, and the most expensive at a cost of six billion dollars. Presenter Brian Cox tackles the question: what exactly is it going to tell us?

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Curse of the Vampire
programme.desc: Terrifying new discoveries reveal the bloody truth behind the legends of vampires, and experts investigate why people believed these monsters had a taste for human blood.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Forbidden City of the Deep
programme.desc: Experts investigate the world's oldest sunken city and reveal the secrets lost to the ocean almost four thousand years ago.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women take the wedding vow 'till death do us part' seriously; they make sure their marriages are "Fatal Ties."

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover Makes Three
programme.desc: Sometimes the love of one person isn't satisfying.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kiss Then Kill
programme.desc: Deadly women "kiss then kill" when love goes wrong.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Good Sister
programme.desc: Sisters who've lived together for nearly 40 years have a deadly falling out over a plan to move to the beach.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The House Out on Wade Road
programme.desc: Byron and Michele Wright overcome broken homes to find solace in one another. But when their blissful union falls apart and a new man arrives on the scene, it unearths violent secrets and a shocking truth.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Body in the Cornfield
programme.desc: Barbara Keim is juggling two ex-husbands and a rebellious teenage daughter with a questionable circle of friends. When Barbara goes missing, her sisters fear the worst.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Good Sister
programme.desc: Sisters who've lived together for nearly 40 years have a deadly falling out over a plan to move to the beach.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The House Out on Wade Road
programme.desc: Byron and Michele Wright overcome broken homes to find solace in one another. But when their blissful union falls apart and a new man arrives on the scene, it unearths violent secrets and a shocking truth.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women take the wedding vow 'till death do us part' seriously; they make sure their marriages are "Fatal Ties."

programme.title: Murder Calls: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A young father calls 911, gasping that he accidentally shot himself while working on a farm. Police race to find him and keep him on the line. They hear a second shot--a shot that reveals an astonishing twist: this shooting was no accident.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A series of bizarre 911 calls come in to police in two cities from a serial killer confessing his crimes. The man becomes known as the Weepy Voiced Killer, due to his strange, whining voice--and many young women will fall before he can be stopped.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fatal Fraternity
programme.desc: Identical twins Wasel and Wael Ali were obsessed with power from an early age. Using false identities they torment unsuspecting people until they become victims of their own game. These twins share more than DNA, they share the same deadly fate.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Roofie Romeos
programme.desc: Identical twins, George and Stefan Spitzer, were reared in the shadow of Communist Romania. They moved to Hollywood to pursue their silver screen dreams. When dreams turned to dust the twins took revenge.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Sisters in Silence
programme.desc: Identical twins June and Jennifer Gibbons were black girls living in the white world of Wales, UK. Subjected to prejudice and abuse they started living in safe silence. Eventually the silent pair were pushed too far, and they set their world ablaze.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Deadly Ride: Part One
programme.desc: The former Uber driver who terrorized Michigan City during a deadly shooting rampage on February 20, 2016 has been sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Deadly Ride: Part Two
programme.desc: The former Uber driver who terrorized Michigan City during a deadly shooting rampage on February 20, 2016 has been sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Mystery in Coronado
programme.desc: A young boy suffers a fatal fall at his father's home. Two days later, the father's girlfriend is found hanging from a rope off a balcony. Two mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Stuck in the Middle
programme.desc: When Paula Cardwell returns from running errands, she finds her 20-year-old daughter, Anna Catherine, lying dead on the kitchen floor. The small town of Wetumpka, Alabama, is left stunned and determined to find the devil in their midst.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: The Sickness
programme.desc: Sue always dreamed of her own little quiet piece of paradise, but her dreams go up in smoke when a sinister guest comes knocking on August 27, 2001.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: When Marlys Sather doesn't return to work after a lunch appointment, her family makes a horrifying discovery. The cops search for the person who set fire to this loving mother of three.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Albuquerque Ambush
programme.desc: Don Fluitt is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, security video captures the moments just before the evil deed and a surprising twist will bring this killer to their knees.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft. Including the bombers that won the war to the B-52, the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.desc: A family is looking for a lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. They find a property they like, but it's far from turnkey. With a massive renovation, they may discover they've bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lake Country Lounging
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget, dashing their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Family Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family. They find a charmer with plenty of space for up to 30 people, but their DIY reno reveals unexpected issues.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Keeping the Dreams Alive
programme.desc: Chase and the team will have their hands full as they navigate the treacherous hillside while they stabilize the camp and restore it so the family can continue to enjoy it for at least another 42 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for Future Generations
programme.desc: Mary wants the Cabin Masters to re-imagine the current footprint of the camp, and create additional bedroom/sleeping space while expanding the bathroom to accommodate their large family.

programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas hit the refresh button when they upgrade the dining room and garage in the Wellington house. They dress up the walls with wallpaper and art to give these spaces a brand new start.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Backyard
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders take the week off to work in their own backyards.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging a Homestead Corn Crib With a Hometown Barn Raising
programme.desc: The guys salvage a homestead corn crib with a good old fashioned barn raising.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Transforming a Shipping Container Into a Portable Barnwood Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys turn a used shipping container into a portable barnwood cabin. They use welding torches and old logs to transform the steel container into a home. Mark searches for the perfect red barnwood to cover it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Digger's Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the whole story of how the Barnwood Builders transformed Digger's cabin into David's dream home, from a muddy take-down in West Virginia to a tricky build in Texas, and a remarkable finished result.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: New Hampshire Barn: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the move of a massive 1802 timber frame barn from New Hampshire to South Carolina, from complicated take-down, through an epic build, all the way to the dramatic finish visit.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Good Eats: Shell Game IV (Scallops)
programme.desc: Tales of a monster scallop send Alton traveling to a small town in Maine to investigate. After meeting with the nervous locals, he sets sail with Capt. Squint upon his house boat, the Okra where he's forced to cook a whole lot of scallop dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Loin
programme.desc: Beef tenderloin is one of the most luxurious cuts of critter known to man, expensive too. Alton investigates where this costly cut comes from, how to buy it and what to do to get your money's worth out of it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Loin 2
programme.desc: Alton completes his strategy of getting your money's worth from the luxurious cut of meat known as beef tenderloin. We learn the legends and preparations of Carpaccio, Philly Cheese steak and the perfect Chateaubriand.

programme.title: Good Eats: Your Pad or Mine (Thai)
programme.desc: When his trip to Thailand is cancelled at the last minute, Alton sets out to find the next best thing a proper Pad Thai.

programme.title: Good Eats: Alton's Countdown to T-Day
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes one final shot at the biggest food holiday of the year.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Oakland
programme.desc: Andrew discovers the true soul of Oakland, CA, as he explores its diversity and sense of community. He visits a cozy breakfast joint, samples some of the city's freshest fare at Swan's Market.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Fez
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Fez, the cultural and spiritual capital of Morocco.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: Andrew tastes his way through the Chesapeake Bay area, trying creamy peanut soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle
programme.desc: Andrew digs into Raleigh, Durham and Chapel Hill- three tasty cities that make up North Carolina's Triangle. A hub for higher education with a booming tech industry, this region is home to a blossoming food scene.

programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Crunchy
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro explores snacks that know how to put that little crunch in your munch, like See's Candies peanut brittle and Snak King's crispy Taco Litos.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Thanksgiving Winners
programme.desc: Michael McKean gives thanks for our favorite Thanksgiving grub. He uncovers whether the turkey or the country came first, how burnt marshmallows ended up on sweet potatoes and if a lawyer gave up his career to put cranberries in a can.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: My Kind Of Town
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking us on a wild ride through the Windy City. He's going to determine if Chicago deep dish is definitely pizza, if brownies are just fancy fair food and he'll shed some light on saganaki's flames.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Deli-licious
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to fill our bellies with delicious dishes from the deli. He's checking out how the bagel met cream cheese and lox, why black and white cookies keep the gray away and when pastrami on rye first piled things high.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Layers of Flavours
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean layers it on thick as he digs into lovely layered feasts. He'll find out if club sandwiches were once for members only, how tiramisu tried to take coffee's job and why London may lay claim to lasagna.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Potlucky
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean enlightens us all on how the potluck got started. He discovers how the casserole began as just a pan, why chocolate sheet cake is a Texas treasure and when potlucks first became bring-and-share bashes.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tasting is Believing
programme.desc: Michael McKean reveals the flavours we hold near and dear are not always what they appear. He'll show us how apple pie could go crackers, why seaweed is giving bacon a run for its money and how texture can totally determine taste.

programme.title: Good Eats: Circle of Life

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Dough Also Rises

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Use Your Noodle: The Reload
programme.desc: Reloading an earlier episode, Alton revisits cold-water pasta cooking, and shares his recipe for Cacio a Pepe.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Cake on Every Plate: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2003 and reinvents the cake that so many folks complained about way back when. This time, the cake isn't just good: it's golden.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Icing Man Cometh
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' this episode from season six with two new buttercreams, including one curious model flavored with buttermilk.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Local Legends

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Cajun Cuisine
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best Cajun dishes, from classics like crawfish, jambalaya and gumbo to a few surprises.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Two Openings - Part One and Two

programme.title: Family Matters: Crazier for You
programme.desc: Myra shows up on Steve and Laura's first date; Harriette's engagement ring is secondhand.

programme.title: Family Matters: Whose Man Is It Anyway

programme.title: Family Matters: Throw Steve From the Train

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Humm Vac

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Canister

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Net Worth
programme.desc: Debra is furious when Ray contributes $1,000 to his friends' new go-cart business.

programme.title: George Lopez: Sabes Quake

programme.title: George Lopez: George Buys a Vow
programme.desc: George auditions wedding singers to help make his wife's dream wedding fantasy a reality.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Watcha's Out for Jason

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parts

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parts

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Poker
programme.desc: When the guys are all playing poker, the girls decide it would be fun to join in. The guys have to teach them how to play the game. Except Monica who knows how to play and is a very competitive person, especially when it is up against her brother Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where the Monkey Gets Away

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ick Factor

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Birth

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Finds Out

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's New Girlfriend
